title: Rise to Wellness - Integrated Wellness Recovery Programme (RTW-I)
text:
Rise to Wellness - Integrated Wellness Recovery Programme (RTW-I) - SupportGoWhere
Rise to Wellness - Integrated Wellness Recovery Programme (RTW-I)
Share link
RTW-I is an integrated, structured wellness recovery programme which aims to improve and sustain the mental health recovery of persons with mental health condition (PMHCs) and/or addiction issues
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based, Online
Free
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

The programme consists of:

Peer Support Groups

Anonymous Groups

Recovery talks/workshops/activities

Befriending

1-to-1 peer support

Counselling/therapy (on a needs basis)

Coaching

Short-term crisis respite

Who is this for?

Singaporean residents, 18 years old and above, either current or new members of PSALT Care, with a formal diagnosis of a mental health condition (self-declaration).



Individuals who do not have a formal diagnosis but are interested to receive RTW-I services will be assessed by PSALT Care staff, clinicians or collaboration partner.

What to expect?

RTW-I is a 9 to 12 months programme and you will be paired with a dedicated supporter who will journey with you 1-to-1 to understand your recovery needs and recommend curated recovery resources to benefit you. Together, you'll make a personal wellness recovery plan to chart your progress, while there will be opportunities to take part in activities that support and empower your recovery, while strengthening your sense of social connection, inclusion and overall wellbeing.

How to apply?

WhatsApp: +65 6205 5538

Email: aloysius@psaltcare.com

Information last updated on 10 Nov 2025
